title: conyza eriophylla
intro: Conyza eriophylla, also known as fleabane or white fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing inflammation. Conyza eriophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
